fields.summary: Missing connection between Invoice and Debit/Credit note

content.text: We noticed that for a lot of Debit and Credit notes the connection with the parent invoice is missing:
synced this conversation thread with the Slack thread
. Replies in synced threads will automatically update across both Slack and Jira.

Hello, A very large part of this list consists of Standard Billing volume invoices (interim deduction flow) . The remaining ones are invoices created from manual credit/debit billing runs, but all of them do not have a parent invoice. The invoice field is mandatory for selection, so I think this is broken data caused by the migration.
If you have information about which invoice should be attached to the manual billing run, we can update this data from the database side.
For the Debit/Credit notes that are manual - we delete the zero invoices connected to them, so they are OK. The problem is with the other invoices generated from the system.

other invoices were generated from the interim deduction flow. these are volume invoices that were deducted, and they do not have any parent invoice because they are generated based on the volume flow (scale/profile).

When we create a Credit/Debit note for a standard invoice, because of the deduction of the interim payment invoice, the system must create a connection between the Invoice and Credit/Debit note, and this connection must be visible in the interface (sub object  - Invoice debit credit note) and in the template JSON (Connected invoices array).

We currently have logic on the JSON side to display the connected invoice, but I do not remember having such logic on the UI side, and I could not find any description for it either. additionally, it will probably be necessary to have a separate sub-object in the invoice for this case, because an interim invoice is neither a Credit nor a Debit invoice. Therefore, we cannot display such an invoice in the "Invoice debit credit note" sub-object.

For an interim we create an invoice. But then during the standard billing process when we deduct this interim we create credit or debit note. This credit/debit note should be connected to the interim invoice. Every credit/debit note should be connected to at least one invoice!
Hello, yes, i understand, but we do not have any description or sub-object in the system for this case. Therefore, it looks more like a change request, and we will need
I also have a few questions about this:
When a standard invoice is deducted by two or more interim invoices, should all of them be connected?
Should in the interim invoice display the standard invoice that was deducted by this interim?
Should we create a new sub-object for the standard invoice?
Should manual interim invoices also be connected?
1. If two or more interim invoices are deducted with a single credit/debit note, this credit/debit note should be connected to all of them
2. Yes, in the section Invoice debit credit note
3. No, should use Invoice debit credit note

As we analyzed, this request impacts 5 types of billing run. For each, including Interim, we need to add another sub-object for parent invoice and show there any deducted or other related initial invoices. Additionally, in the Interim Invoice, we need to show the connected Invoice debit credit note (which is a bug). Should we convert this bug into a change and add additional description, or should we create a seperate change and keep this bug as it is?

status.description: This status is managed internally by Jira Software
